title: Rashmi Rocket
subTitle: A small-town girl overcomes all societal barriers to become a national-level athlete, but her glory is meaningless when she must undergo a gender test.

title: U-Turn
subTitle: A journalist investigating traffic offenders on a flyover becomes embroiled in an investigation after being accused of murdering one of the motorcyclists.

title: CityLights
subTitle: Deepak Singh, an ex-army person from Rajasthan, moves to Mumbai with his family hoping for a better lifestyle. However, upon arrival, he realises that everything is not as easy as it seems.

title: Sherdil: The Pilibhit Saga
subTitle: A sacrificed village leader, Gangaram, embarks on a journey in search of a dangerous tiger that threatens people.

title: Suraj Pe Mangal Bhari
subTitle: Suraj, an eligible bachelor, finds himself getting rejected by the families of many potential brides. Soon, he learns that a wedding detective named Madhu Mangal Rane is the reason.

title: Faraaz
subTitle: Five terrorists take the staff and customers of Holey Artisan cafe in Dhaka hostage. Faraaz and his friends are among the hostages as the police try to de-escalate the situation.

title: Mom
subTitle: Devki, a biology teacher, seeks help from DK, a private detective, and vows to get revenge after her stepdaughter's rapists are acquitted by the court.

title: Rustom
subTitle: Rustom, a naval officer, shares a happy relationship with his wife Cynthia. Soon, he discovers her affair with Vikram, a close friend, and is accused of murdering him.

title: Trapped
subTitle: A desperate Shaurya moves into an empty high-rise building where he and his lover can stay. However, things take a dark turn when he finds himself locked in his new apartment without any amenities.

title: Laila Majnu
subTitle: Laila, a free-spirited woman and Qais, a young man from a liberal background fall in love despite societal and familial opposition, leading to separation and deep personal turmoil.

title: Ground Zero
subTitle: Following the brutal attack on Parliament in 2001, armed police officer Dubey takes the lead in an investigation against Ghazi Baba.

title: Nil Battey Sannata
subTitle: When Apeksha loses her interest in academics, her mother Chanda joins school to complete her education and motivate Apeksha.

title: Nil Battey Sannata
subTitle: When Apeksha loses her interest in academics, her mother Chanda joins school to complete her education and motivate Apeksha.

title: Traffic Signal
subTitle: Silsila works as a loyal subordinate to a don, but complications arise when he unwittingly becomes a pawn in his boss's evil plan.

title: Jail
subTitle: A false drug accusation by a friend destroys Parag's life. He struggles through prison, clinging to hope for legal assistance to prove his innocence.

title: Yeh Saali Aashiqui
subTitle: Upon finding a way to escape from an asylum by switching with his identical twin, Sahil sets out to hunt for his ex-girlfriend and seek revenge on her.

title: Kadvi Hawa
subTitle: A blind old man, worried about the survival and well-being of his son, decides to strike a deal with a debt collector to prevent his child from falling into a debt trap.

title: Thappad
subTitle: Amrita, a young woman, leads a content life with her husband, Vikram. However, their happiness is shattered when he slaps her at an office party, causing her to file for a divorce.

title: Love Hostel
subTitle: A series of bloodshed, escapes and deception ensue when Jyothi and Ashu elope together and her family hires a ruthless mercenary to kill the couple.

title: Mission Majnu
subTitle: An undercover Indian spy takes on a deadly mission to expose a covert nuclear weapons program in the heart of Pakistan that could destroy the free world.

title: Raangi
subTitle: Thaiyal Nayagi tries to protect her niece from an online predator. However, things escalate when the FBI's attempt to catch the culprit puts them both in danger as they unwittingly become bait.

title: Hamari Adhuri Kahani
subTitle: Half a decade after her husband went missing, Vasudha, a single mother, falls for Aarav, a hotelier. However, her missing husband, Hari, returns, thereby creating a rift between the two lovers.

title: Chandu Champion
subTitle: An extraordinary man confronts relentless challenges with unwavering determination. His spirit and resilience propel him through adversity, ultimately forging a path to historic achievement.

title: English Vinglish
subTitle: A housewife and caterer, Shashi, is usually mocked by her family for not knowing English. Her attempt to learn the language helps her rediscover herself and reassert her value as a mother and a wife.

title: English Vinglish
subTitle: A housewife and caterer, Shashi, is usually mocked by her family for not knowing English. Her attempt to learn the language helps her rediscover herself and reassert her value as a mother and a wife.

title: Turtle
subTitle: Ramkaran tirelessly churns the dry earth of a village in Rajasthan for water. Meanwhile, the villagers participate in desperate measures to satisfy their thirst.

title: Waah Zindagi
subTitle: A struggling farmer's son sets out to become an entrepreneur and win over his childhood love. However, foreign businesses threaten to ruin his path to success.

title: Joggers' Park
subTitle: Jyotin Chatterjee, a former judge, falls for Jenny, a young and independent woman. However, things take a turn when his family scrutinises their relationship.

title: Iqbal
subTitle: Iqbal, a speech and hearing impaired boy, wishes to play cricket for the Indian team but his impairment overshadows his talent. Thus, he seeks help from a former cricket player to train him.

title: Babumoshai Bandookbaaz
subTitle: Babu Bihari, a professional contract killer, is assigned a target by Jiji, a ruthless politician. However, during his mission, when he meets Fulwa, a young woman, things go awry.

title: Manikarnika: The Queen of Jhansi
subTitle: After the death of her husband and child, Lakshmibai takes over the throne of Jhansi and defends the kingdom against the tyranny of the East India Company.

title: Madgaon Express
subTitle: Childhood friends Dodo, Ayush, and Pinku embark on a trip to Goa that goes completely off-track due to a sequence of terrible decisions.

title: Auron Mein Kahan Dum Tha
subTitle: As Krishna, an incarcerated man, faces early release, his love story with Vasudha from more than twenty years ago unfurls.

title: Fitoor
subTitle: Noor, a Kashmiri boy from a poor family, is hired as a stable keeper by a begum. Later, when he begins to fall in love with Firdaus, the begum's daughter, she separates them by sending her away.

title: Crew
subTitle: Three ambitious female cabin attendants from Mumbai get caught in a web of lies during their pursuit of dreams, leading to an unexpected heist.

title: Hotel Mumbai
subTitle: A hotel staff risks everything to keep its patrons safe during a terror attack, especially a British heiress, her husband and her infant.
